info.name: ITEC park selfservice API 2
info.description: Postman collection for the ITEC Client API/ITEC Parking API.

request.description: Authenticate user and receive JWT token. `username` accepts a username, email, or phone number; phone-only accounts still require a password to be set via /auth/phone/link/verify or /auth/password/set.

originalRequest.description: Authenticate user and receive JWT token. `username` accepts a username, email, or phone number; phone-only accounts still require a password to be set via /auth/phone/link/verify or /auth/password/set.

Authenticate user and receive JWT token. `username` accepts a username, email, or phone number; phone-only accounts still require a password to be set via /auth/phone/link/verify or /auth/password/set.

request.description: Check if the provided JWT token is valid.

originalRequest.description: Check if the provided JWT token is valid.
Check if the provided JWT token is valid.

request.description: Initiate user registration, possibly sending an OTP.

request.description: Find-or-create a user from a verified Google sign-in and return a session, same shape as /auth/login. Requires the shared X-Internal-Secret header.

originalRequest.description: Find-or-create a user from a verified Google sign-in and return a session, same shape as /auth/login. Requires the shared X-Internal-Secret header.
Find-or-create a user from a verified Google sign-in and return a session, same shape as /auth/login. Requires the shared X-Internal-Secret header.
Find-or-create a user from a verified Google sign-in and return a session, same shape as /auth/login. Requires the shared X-Internal-Secret header.

request.description: Find-or-create a user from a verified Facebook sign-in and return a session, same shape as /auth/login. Requires the shared X-Internal-Secret header.

originalRequest.description: Find-or-create a user from a verified Facebook sign-in and return a session, same shape as /auth/login. Requires the shared X-Internal-Secret header.
Find-or-create a user from a verified Facebook sign-in and return a session, same shape as /auth/login. Requires the shared X-Internal-Secret header.

request.description: Find-or-create a user from a verified Apple sign-in and return a session, same shape as /auth/login. Apple only sends `name` on the very first authorization; apple_id is the durable identifier. Requires the shared X-Internal-Secret header.

originalRequest.description: Find-or-create a user from a verified Apple sign-in and return a session, same shape as /auth/login. Apple only sends `name` on the very first authorization; apple_id is the durable identifier. Requires the shared X-Internal-Secret header.

Find-or-create a user from a verified Apple sign-in and return a session, same shape as /auth/login. Apple only sends `name` on the very first authorization; apple_id is the durable identifier. Requires the shared X-Internal-Secret header.

request.description: Send an OTP to attach a phone number to the authenticated (e.g. social) account. Distinct from /auth/register/*, which creates a new account rather than attaching to an existing one.

originalRequest.description: Send an OTP to attach a phone number to the authenticated (e.g. social) account. Distinct from /auth/register/*, which creates a new account rather than attaching to an existing one.
Send an OTP to attach a phone number to the authenticated (e.g. social) account. Distinct from /auth/register/*, which creates a new account rather than attaching to an existing one.

request.description: Verify the OTP, attach the phone as the account's primary number, optionally set a password, and flip requires_phone to false.

originalRequest.description: Verify the OTP, attach the phone as the account's primary number, optionally set a password, and flip requires_phone to false.
Verify the OTP, attach the phone as the account's primary number, optionally set a password, and flip requires_phone to false.

request.description: Set or replace a password on the authenticated account, independent of phone-link status. No OTP required since the account's email is already provider-verified. Enables /auth/login with email+password afterward.

originalRequest.description: Set or replace a password on the authenticated account, independent of phone-link status. No OTP required since the account's email is already provider-verified. Enables /auth/login with email+password afterward.

response.name: Error 400 - too short

originalRequest.description: Set or replace a password on the authenticated account, independent of phone-link status. No OTP required since the account's email is already provider-verified. Enables /auth/login with email+password afterward.

request.description: Retrieve a list of all active parking locations.
Retrieve parking details by record ID in format db_id-parking_id.
Admin-only: get all configured external databases.
Admin-only: get details of a single database config.
Admin-only: test a single database connection.
Admin-only: run an SQL query on the external DB with ID 2.
Get pricing data for parking record ID 1-101.
Get car categories for a given DB ID = 1.
Retrieve receipts for the current user's phone numbers. You can filter by date range and specific phone number.

response.name: 200 Success Response
response.body:
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": [
    {
      "park_out_receipt_id": "12345",
      "exit_time": "2023-05-15 14:30:00",
      "entre_time": "2023-05-15 10:15:00",

      "receipt_link": "http://example.com/receipts/12345.pdf",

      "phone": "+250700000000",

        "id": "101",

      },

    },
    {

variable.description: Shared secret sent as X-Internal-Secret on the social login callback endpoints. Set to the value configured server-side in SOCIAL_INTERNAL_SECRET.
